notes.title: Live Meeting - 2026-04-11 17:22
notes.summary: The meeting was called to order, and the agenda was adopted. Staff Sergeant Ron Poydor presented statistics on traffic offenses and crimes against property. The council discussed the increase in traffic offenses and the decrease in crimes against property in certain areas. The meeting also touched on the safety concerns of a resident living on Bernat. The sergeant mentioned that the police presence in the area is consistent, but the numbers are low. The council decided to move forward with the current plan and wait for more information before making any changes. The meeting concluded with an update on human resources and the anticipation of new personnel joining the team.
key_decisions: Move item 7.1 with Staff Sergeant Ron Poydor to the next item on the agenda

action_items.task: Follow up with the resident on Bernat regarding safety concerns
Fill the vacancy on the provincial side
